profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Trisula International Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, designs and manufactures garments in Indonesia. It operates through four segments: Manufacturing, Distribution, Uniform, and Retail. The company offers fabrics, jackets, ladies bottom, trouser, casual, corporate uniforms, and functional clothing, lower garment products, golf sportswear, protective wear jacket and trouser, and others. It is also involved in yarn spinning, weaving, dyeing, bleaching, and fabric finishing. In addition, the company provides uniforms for various sectors, including corporations, banking institutions, hotels, government agencies, airlines, and international organizations. It markets and distributes textile and garments products through physical stores and e-commerce platforms. The company also exports its products. PT Trisula International Tbk was incorporated in 1968 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Trisula International Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Inti Nusa Damai.
